targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_range_begin AS time, SUM(count) AS "pass messages" FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE (policy_evaluated_dkim='pass' OR policy_evaluated_spf='pass') AND date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY date_range_begin ORDER BY date_range_begin

SELECT date_range_begin AS time, SUM(count) AS "fail messages" FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE policy_evaluated_dkim='fail' AND policy_evaluated_spf='fail' AND date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY date_range_begin ORDER BY date_range_begin

SELECT source_ip, SUM(count) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='pass' OR policy_evaluated_spf='pass' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS pass, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='fail' AND policy_evaluated_spf='fail' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS fail FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY source_ip ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT org_name, COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS reports, SUM(count) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='pass' OR policy_evaluated_spf='pass' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS pass, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='fail' AND policy_evaluated_spf='fail' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS fail FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY org_name ORDER BY total DESC

panels.title: Source IP x Organization (Top 10 Fail Rate)

targets.rawSQL: SELECT source_ip, org_name, SUM(count) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='pass' OR policy_evaluated_spf='pass' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS dmarc_pass, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='fail' AND policy_evaluated_spf='fail' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS dmarc_fail, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_spf='pass' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS spf_pass, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_spf='fail' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS spf_fail, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='pass' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS dkim_pass, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='fail' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS dkim_fail FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY source_ip, org_name HAVING SUM(count) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='fail' AND policy_evaluated_spf='fail' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / SUM(count) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT policy_evaluated_spf AS result, SUM(count) AS messages FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY policy_evaluated_spf

SELECT policy_evaluated_dkim AS result, SUM(count) AS messages FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY policy_evaluated_dkim
